summary: Final pass: FR12 (report on past/broken runs + done guidance) + FR11 (docs/Pages/version sweep). FR12: gogo-knowledge validate-in now has explicit STRICT (in-pipeline, after green) vs LENIENT (standalone /gogo:report <slug> on a past/broken run) modes — lenient synthesizes a best-effort report/report.md from whatever artifacts exist, keeps state honest (no false clean done), draws only derivable UML, and adds a required 'Run status / gaps' section (also added to report.template.md); plan.md is the one true prerequisite (else STOP). commands/report.md documents the broken-run mode. gogo-done (skill + command) STOP message now reads exactly 'No report found for <feature> — run /gogo:report <feature> first, then /gogo:done.'. FR11: command set is now 12 (added done + view) — synced README commands list (12), docs/commands.md groups intro ('12 commands in four groups' + new Ship & view section + report broken-run note), docs/architecture.md commands/ tree (done.md + view.md) and skills/ tree (gogo-done + gogo-view) + enriched resources/ map line, docs/flow.md (lenient report + View section + done's missing-report STOP), skills/gogo/SKILL.md (lenient report + View command). README 'What gets created' gained .gogo/resources/ + .gogo/changelog/. plugin.json bumped 0.4.0 -> 0.5.0. Markdown-only plugin (no compile); no charts/manifest.json this round (pure docs/process change — no new as-built UML). Validate-out: result.json conforms to phase-result.schema.json; 12 commands and 12 skill dirs on disk match every enumeration; zero stale 10/11-command counts.
